Contact us This is the official website of Taiwo Owatemi, MP for Coventry North West. Please note that due to strict Parliamentary protocol I am only able to make enquiries on behalf of my own constituents. To find out if I am your MP click here. quick links Homepage About Me Help & Advice My Work News & Updates Contact Me Office Policies Homepage About Me Help & Advice My Work News & Updates Contact Me Office Policies Contact Info Constituency Office: 02477 672089 taiwo.owatemi.mp@parliament.uk join My Newsletter Sign up for my newsletter to enjoy updates on Labour policy, my campaigns, and the recent work I’ve been doing in Westminster and Coventry.
